title: dalbergia modesta
intro: Dalbergia modesta, also known as the Philippine rosewood or Philippine ebony, is a species of tree in the family Fabaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Dalbergia modesta include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the wood of the tree is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
